justification: The diff correctly upgrades Spring Boot to 3.3.13 and Java to 21, adds @Serial annotations for serialVersionUID fields (lines 4-5 in ReactiveGenericError.java and lines 3-4, 10-11 in DataNotFoundException.java), and modernizes JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 imports/annotations in tests. The application.yml update reflects Spring Boot 3's config activation syntax. No spurious churn is present.
